<article class="level6 chunking-small type-Section has-history" id="12.14.250" data-cite="BMC 12.14.250" data-short-cite="12.14.250" data-history="/BMC/12.14.250/history"><header class=" full-header" data-type="Section" data-search="/BMC/12.14.250/search" data-share="/BMC/12.14.250/share" data-levelnodes-target="header"><h6 class=" inner-header"><span class="num">12.14.250</span> <span class="name">Alternative energy infrastructure.</span></h6></header><div class="track-indicator selected d-none">
<span class="glyphicons glyphicons-check" aria-hidden="true"></span><span class="text">This section is included in your selections.</span>
</div>




<section class="subsec subsec1 chunking-none type-Subsec1" id="12.14.250(A)" data-cite="BMC 12.14.250(A)" data-short-cite="12.14.250(A)"><p class="heading"><span class="header"><span class="num">A.&#x2002;</span><span class="name">Purpose and Intent.</span> </span>This section is established to:</p>




<section class="subsec subsec2 chunking-none type-Subsec2" id="12.14.250(A)(1)" data-cite="BMC 12.14.250(A)(1)" data-short-cite="12.14.250(A)(1)"><p><span class="header num-only"><span class="num">1.&#x2002;</span></span>Promote clean energy production by citizens and businesses;</p>



</section>
<section class="subsec subsec2 chunking-none type-Subsec2" id="12.14.250(A)(2)" data-cite="BMC 12.14.250(A)(2)" data-short-cite="12.14.250(A)(2)"><p><span class="header num-only"><span class="num">2.&#x2002;</span></span>Ensure that alternative energy infrastructure is compatible with the development and development on adjacent properties;</p>



</section>
<section class="subsec subsec2 chunking-none type-Subsec2" id="12.14.250(A)(3)" data-cite="BMC 12.14.250(A)(3)" data-short-cite="12.14.250(A)(3)"><p><span class="header num-only"><span class="num">3.&#x2002;</span></span>Provide options to traditional energy use; and</p>



</section>
<section class="subsec subsec2 chunking-none type-Subsec2" id="12.14.250(A)(4)" data-cite="BMC 12.14.250(A)(4)" data-short-cite="12.14.250(A)(4)"><p><span class="header num-only"><span class="num">4.&#x2002;</span></span>Promote reduction of energy use within the city.</p>



</section>
</section>
<section class="subsec subsec1 chunking-none type-Subsec1" id="12.14.250(B)" data-cite="BMC 12.14.250(B)" data-short-cite="12.14.250(B)"><p class="heading"><span class="header"><span class="num">B.&#x2002;</span><span class="name">General Criteria.</span> </span>Alternative energy infrastructure shall meet all of the following criteria:</p>




<section class="subsec subsec2 chunking-none type-Subsec2" id="12.14.250(B)(1)" data-cite="BMC 12.14.250(B)(1)" data-short-cite="12.14.250(B)(1)"><p><span class="header"><span class="num">1.&#x2002;</span><span class="name">Setbacks.</span> </span>Alternative energy infrastructure shall not be located within any building setback or required setback, unless below grade or as allowed in BMC <a class="cite" href="12.14.070(E)" title="12.14.070(E)">12.14.070(E)</a> for pad-mounted equipment and BMC <a class="cite" href="12.14.090(D)" title="12.14.090(D)">12.14.090(D)</a> for panels that are components of roof structures.</p>




</section>
<section class="subsec subsec2 chunking-none type-Subsec2" id="12.14.250(B)(2)" data-cite="BMC 12.14.250(B)(2)" data-short-cite="12.14.250(B)(2)"><p><span class="header"><span class="num">2.&#x2002;</span><span class="name">Compliance with International Building Code.</span> </span>Any installation of an alternative energy system shall comply with any and all applicable provisions of the International Building Code.</p>




</section>
<section class="subsec subsec2 chunking-none type-Subsec2" id="12.14.250(B)(3)" data-cite="BMC 12.14.250(B)(3)" data-short-cite="12.14.250(B)(3)"><p><span class="header"><span class="num">3.&#x2002;</span><span class="name">Compliance with National Electrical Code.</span> </span>Any installation of an alternative energy system shall comply with any and all applicable provisions of the National Electrical Code.</p>




</section>
<section class="subsec subsec2 chunking-none type-Subsec2" id="12.14.250(B)(4)" data-cite="BMC 12.14.250(B)(4)" data-short-cite="12.14.250(B)(4)"><p><span class="header"><span class="num">4.&#x2002;</span><span class="name">Utility Notification.</span> </span>No alternative energy system shall be installed unless evidence has been provided to the city of Bothell that the utility company has been informed of the customer&#x2019;s intent to install an interconnected customer-owned power generation system. Off-grid systems shall be exempt from this requirement.</p>




</section>
<section class="subsec subsec2 chunking-none type-Subsec2" id="12.14.250(B)(5)" data-cite="BMC 12.14.250(B)(5)" data-short-cite="12.14.250(B)(5)"><p><span class="header"><span class="num">5.&#x2002;</span><span class="name">Compliance with Environmental Regulations.</span> </span>Any installation of alternative energy infrastructure shall comply with all applicable environmental regulations.</p>




</section>
</section>
<section class="subsec subsec1 chunking-none type-Subsec1" id="12.14.250(C)" data-cite="BMC 12.14.250(C)" data-short-cite="12.14.250(C)"><p class="heading"><span class="header"><span class="num">C.&#x2002;</span><span class="name">Geothermal Infrastructure Criteria.</span> </span>In addition to the approval criteria established in subsection <a class="cite" href="12.14.250(B)" title="12.14.250(B)&#x2002;General Criteria">B</a> of this section, geothermal alternative energy systems are encouraged and shall comply with the following standards:</p>




<section class="subsec subsec2 chunking-none type-Subsec2" id="12.14.250(C)(1)" data-cite="BMC 12.14.250(C)(1)" data-short-cite="12.14.250(C)(1)"><p><span class="header"><span class="num">1.&#x2002;</span><span class="name">Location.</span> </span>Geothermal infrastructure shall be located entirely within the subject property, or within appropriate easements.</p>




</section>
<section class="subsec subsec2 chunking-none type-Subsec2" id="12.14.250(C)(2)" data-cite="BMC 12.14.250(C)(2)" data-short-cite="12.14.250(C)(2)"><p><span class="header"><span class="num">2.&#x2002;</span><span class="name">Installation.</span> </span>Installation of geothermal infrastructure shall comply with all building department requirements, and applicable state laws and codes.</p>




</section>
</section>
<section class="subsec subsec1 chunking-none type-Subsec1" id="12.14.250(D)" data-cite="BMC 12.14.250(D)" data-short-cite="12.14.250(D)"><p class="heading"><span class="header"><span class="num">D.&#x2002;</span><span class="name">Solar and Wind Infrastructure.</span> </span>Alternative energy facilities, including solar and wind equipment, are encouraged, subject to the following provisions:</p>




<section class="subsec subsec2 chunking-none type-Subsec2" id="12.14.250(D)(1)" data-cite="BMC 12.14.250(D)(1)" data-short-cite="12.14.250(D)(1)"><p class="header"><span class="num">1.&#x2002;</span><span class="name">Solar and Wind Infrastructure Requirements.</span> </p>



<section class="subsec subsec3 chunking-none type-Subsec3" id="12.14.250(D)(1)(a)" data-cite="BMC 12.14.250(D)(1)(a)" data-short-cite="12.14.250(D)(1)(a)"><p><span class="header num-only"><span class="num">a.&#x2002;</span></span>Building-mounted solar and wind equipment shall be integrated into the structure&#x2019;s architectural design. Techniques for achieving this include, but are not limited to, aligning equipment with a building&#x2019;s structural or functional articulation, coordinating panel placement with other building features or using equipment to enhance a building&#x2019;s architectural expression.</p>



</section>
<section class="subsec subsec3 chunking-none type-Subsec3" id="12.14.250(D)(1)(b)" data-cite="BMC 12.14.250(D)(1)(b)" data-short-cite="12.14.250(D)(1)(b)"><p><span class="header num-only"><span class="num">b.&#x2002;</span></span>Roof-mounted solar and wind equipment may extend above the building height limit without screening, but shall be designed to avoid creating glare or blocking views and solar access to surrounding properties.</p>



</section>
</section>
<section class="subsec subsec2 chunking-none type-Subsec2" id="12.14.250(D)(2)" data-cite="BMC 12.14.250(D)(2)" data-short-cite="12.14.250(D)(2)"><p class="header"><span class="num">2.&#x2002;</span><span class="name">Solar and Wind Infrastructure Guidelines.</span> </p>



<section class="subsec subsec3 chunking-none type-Subsec3" id="12.14.250(D)(2)(a)" data-cite="BMC 12.14.250(D)(2)(a)" data-short-cite="12.14.250(D)(2)(a)"><p><span class="header num-only"><span class="num">a.&#x2002;</span></span>Use of solar panels to serve other functions, like weather protection, shading, building articulation and place-making, is encouraged.</p>



</section>
<section class="subsec subsec3 chunking-none type-Subsec3" id="12.14.250(D)(2)(b)" data-cite="BMC 12.14.250(D)(2)(b)" data-short-cite="12.14.250(D)(2)(b)"><p><span class="header num-only"><span class="num">b.&#x2002;</span></span>Exposing solar and wind equipment in a way that enhances architectural design and demonstrates the viability of alternative energy is encouraged. <span class="note history history--linked" data-action="click-&gt;levelnodes#openHistory">(Ord. 2107 &#xA7;&#xA0;2 (Exh. B), 2012).</span></p>



</section>
</section>
</section>



</article>
</article>
</div>

</main>

</div>
</div>

</a>

12.14.060 Setbacks – Adjoining alleys
</a>

<footer id="site-footer" class="sitefooter" data-controller="sitefooter">
<div class="inner">


<div class="sitefooter-message sitefooter-internet-explorer-message no-custom-style" role="alert">
<p>This site does not support Internet Explorer. To view this site, consider using one of the following browsers: Google Chrome, Mozilla Firefox, or Apple Safari.</p>
</div>





<div class="sitefooter-disclaimer">
<p><b>The Bothell Municipal Code is current through Ordinance 2480, passed March 3, 2026.</b></p>
<p>Disclaimer: The city clerk&#x2019;s office has the official version of the Bothell Municipal Code. Users should contact the city clerk&#x2019;s office for ordinances passed subsequent to the ordinance cited above.</p>

</div>

<div class="sitefooter-links">

class="sitefooter-link url"
href="http://www.ci.bothell.wa.us/"
>City Website: www.ci.bothell.wa.us</a>
</div>

class="sitefooter-brand"

rel="external noopener"
><span class="sitefooter-logo">Hosted by General Code.</span></a>

</div>

</div>

<nav
id="contents"
class="contents contents-modal modal fade d-print-none"
role="dialog"
tabindex="-1"
data-controller="contents"
>
<div class="modal-dialog modal-lg" role="document">
<div class="modal-content modal-tabbed">

<header class="modal-header">
<h1 class="modal-title">Contents</h1>
<button type="button" class="close" aria-label="Close" data-dismiss="modal">
<span aria-hidden="true">&times;</span>
</button>
</header>

<ul
class="nav nav-tabs"
role="tablist"
>

<li
class="nav-item contents-product-tab primary really-current current"
data-contents-target="productTab"
>
<a
href="#contents-product-BMC"
id="contents-product-BMC-tab"
class="nav-link active"
data-toggle="tab"
data-contents-target="navTab"
role="tab"
aria-controls="contents-product-BMC"
aria-selected="true"
>
<span class="text">
Municipal Code
</span>
</a>
</li>

<li class="nav-item selections">
<a
href="#contents-selections"
id="contents-selections-tab"
class="nav-link"
data-toggle="tab"
data-contents-target="navTab"
role="tab"
aria-controls="contents-selections"
aria-selected="false"
>
<span class="glyphicons glyphicons-check" aria-hidden="true"></span
><span class="text">Your Selections</span>
<span class="badge badge-pill selections-count"></span>
</a>
</li>
</ul>


<div class="modal-body" data-contents-target="modalBody">
<div class="tab-content">

<div id="contents-product-BMC"
class="tab-pane contents-product really-current current active show"
role="tabpanel"
data-contents-target="tabPane currentTabPane"
data-source="/BMC/contents?current=12.14.030&amp;interactive=true"
data-scope="BMC"
aria-labelledby="contents-product-BMC-tab">
</div>


<div id="contents-selections"
class="tab-pane"
role="tabpanel"
data-source="/selections"
data-scope="selections"
data-contents-target="tabPane"
aria-labelledby="contents-selections-tab">
</div>

</div>
</div>

<div class="modal-footer">
<div data-contents-target="tocControls" class="contents-controls">
<button
class="contents-expand btn btn-light d-none d-sm-block"
type="button"
data-action="contents#expandAll"
>
<span class="glyphicons glyphicons-plus" aria-hidden="true"></span
><span class="text">Expand All</span>
</button>
<button
class="contents-collapse btn btn-light d-none d-sm-block"
type="button"
data-action="contents#collapseAll"
>
<span class="glyphicons glyphicons-minus" aria-hidden="true"></span
><span class="text">Collapse All</span>
</button>
</div>

<div data-contents-target="selectControls" class="contents-controls">
<a
id="contents-share-selections"
class="btn btn-primary disabled"
href="/selections/share"
data-controller="dynamodal"
data-dynamodal-selections-value="true"
data-remote="false"
data-action="contents#shareSelections"
rel="nofollow"
>
<span class="glyphicons glyphicons-disk-export" aria-hidden="true"></span
><span class="text" aria-label="Share Your Selections">Share</span>
</a>
<button
id="contents-clear-selections"
class="btn btn-warning disabled"
data-action="contents#clearSelections"
>
<span class="glyphicons glyphicons-erase" aria-hidden="true"></span
><span class="text d-none d-sm-inline">Clear</span>
</button>
</div>

<button
class="btn btn-light"
type="button"
title="Close"
data-dismiss="modal"
>
<span class="glyphicons glyphicons-remove d-sm-none" aria-hidden="true"></span
><span class="text d-none d-sm-inline">Close</span>
</button>
</div>

</div>
</div>
</nav>

<aside
id="large-view"
class="largeviewmodal modal fade"
role="dialog"
tabindex="-1"
data-controller="largeviewmodal"
>
<div class="largeviewmodal-dialog modal-dialog modal-xl" role="document">
<div class="largeviewmodal-content modal-content" data-largeviewmodal-target="modalContent">

<div class="largeviewmodal-header modal-header">
<h1 class="modal-title for-tables">View Full Table</h1>
<h1 class="modal-title for-pictures">View Full Image</h1>
<h1 class="modal-title for-files">View Full File</h1>
<button
type="button"
class="close"
aria-label="Close"
data-dismiss="modal"
><span aria-hidden="true">&times;</span></button>
</div>

<div class="largeviewmodal-body modal-body main" data-largeviewmodal-target="modalBody">
</div>

<div class="largeviewmodal-footer modal-footer">
<button
type="button"
class="btn btn-default pull-left large-view-scroll-top"
title="Go to Top"
data-action="largeviewmodal#scrollModal"
>
<span class="glyphicons glyphicons-arrow-up" aria-hidden="true"></span> <span class="d-none d-sm-inline">Go to Top</span>
</button>
<button
type="button"
class="btn btn-default pull-left large-view-scroll-bottom"
title="Go to Bottom"
data-action="largeviewmodal#scrollModal"
>
<span class="glyphicons glyphicons-arrow-down" aria-hidden="true"></span> <span class="d-none d-sm-inline">Go to Bottom</span>
</button>
<a
href
class="btn btn-default share"
role="button"
title="Share/Save"
data-action="largeviewmodal#shareContent"
data-largeviewmodal-target="share"
>
<span class="glyphicons glyphicons-disk-export" aria-hidden="true"></span> <span>Share/Save</span>
</a>
<button
type="button"
class="btn btn-default"
title="Close"
data-dismiss="modal"
>
<span class="glyphicons glyphicons-remove d-inline d-sm-none" aria-hidden="true"></span>
<span class="d-none d-sm-inline">Close</span>
</button>
</div>

</div>
</div>
</aside>


<aside
class="subsecnodeactions subsec-actions d-print-none d-none d-sm-block invisible"
data-controller="subsecnodeactions"
>
<div
class="dropdown"
data-subsecnodeactions-target="dropdown"
>

type="button"
aria-haspopup="true"
aria-expanded="false"
aria-label="Subsection Tools"

>

>
